languages.text: Кровавые отпечатки босых ног тянутся дальше по коридору. В воздухе пахнет машинными маслами и какими-то препаратами.
Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.
languages.original_text: Кровавые отпечатки босых ног тянутся дальше по коридору. В воздухе пахнет машинными маслами и какими-то препаратами.

traits.locale_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.
Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.
Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

languages.text: 血まみれの裸足跡はさらに通路を下へ伸びていく。機械油や薬の匂いが漂う。
languages.original_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

traits.locale_text: 血まみれの裸足跡はさらに通路を下へ伸びていく。機械油や薬の匂いが漂う。

languages.text: 染血的赤足脚印一直延伸至通道深处。空气中弥漫着机油和医疗物质的气味。
languages.original_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

traits.locale_text: 染血的赤足脚印一直延伸至通道深处。空气中弥漫着机油和医疗物质的气味。

languages.text: Des empreintes sanglantes de pieds nus s'éloignent dans le passage. L'air est imprégné de l'odeur d'onguents mécaniques et de substances de medicae.
languages.original_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

traits.locale_text: Des empreintes sanglantes de pieds nus s'éloignent dans le passage. L'air est imprégné de l'odeur d'onguents mécaniques et de substances de medicae.

languages.text: Unas pisadas desnudas y sangrientas se extienden por el pasadizo. El aire huele a ungüentos de máquina y a sustancias de medicae.
languages.original_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

traits.locale_text: Unas pisadas desnudas y sangrientas se extienden por el pasadizo. El aire huele a ungüentos de máquina y a sustancias de medicae.

languages.text: Kanlı, çıplak ayak izleri koridor boyunca uzanıyor. Havada makine özyağı ve sıhhiye maddelerinin kokusu var.
languages.original_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

traits.locale_text: Kanlı, çıplak ayak izleri koridor boyunca uzanıyor. Havada makine özyağı ve sıhhiye maddelerinin kokusu var.

languages.text: Blutige Spuren nackter Füße führen tiefer in den Gang. Die Luft riecht nach Maschinenölen und medizinischen Substanzen.
languages.original_text: Bloody, bare footprints stretch further down the passageway. The air smells of machine unguents and medicae substances.

traits.locale_text: Blutige Spuren nackter Füße führen tiefer in den Gang. Die Luft riecht nach Maschinenölen und medizinischen Substanzen.
